tagline: Two days to understand how capital moves across Latin America
heroLead: Education, debate and real connection between investors, managers and founders. Six asset classes in one conversation.

about.title: The event
about.lead: Two days in Medellín where investors, family offices, fund managers, founders and project managers come together in one conversation across six asset classes: real estate, venture capital & private equity, public markets, alternatives, crypto and passion assets. Education, debate and deal-making in the same space.

thesis.title: Real Estate
thesis.desc: The Latin American wealth core. Multifamily, BTR and cross-border vehicles.

thesis.title: Venture Capital
thesis.desc: Early and growth in LatAm. Active funds, disciplined tickets, founders executing.

thesis.title: Private Equity
thesis.desc: Mid-market buyouts, co-investments and secondaries for family offices and HNWIs.

thesis.title: Sports
thesis.desc: Investing in athletes, clubs and careers. A young asset class with asymmetric returns.

thesis.title: Private Debt
thesis.desc: Direct lending and venture debt with attractive yields in hard currency.

thesis.title: Emerging Sectors
thesis.desc: Tokenization, distributed energy and new alternative vehicles.

finalCTA.title: October 2026.
finalCTA.highlight: Medellín decides who's in the room.
